post.description: Allows admin users to create and send a notification to a specific user.

get.description: Returns KPI summary analytics for the selected period.
Returns revenue analytics grouped by time for the selected period.
Returns orders count grouped by time for the selected period.
Returns pie chart distribution data for services.
Returns ranked top technicians by performance.
Generates and returns an exportable report file (Excel/PDF).
Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user.
Returns the unread notifications count for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Marks one notification as read for the authenticated user.
Marks all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Soft deletes one notification for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves all test items from the database. Returns 500 if a database error occurs.
